The '''Okonomo Retreat''',<ref name="swcw" /> also known as the '''Royal Pavilion''',<ref name="votf">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref> was a luxurious pavilion owned by the [[House of Organa/Legends|royal family]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], in which they hosted the annual [[Grand Alderaanian Gathering]]. Around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the pavilion was the scene of the [[Okonomo Tragedy]].<ref name="swcw" />

==Appearances==
*''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' {{1stID|Okonomo Retreat}}
